category.scope_note: Wireless and radio devices exported from China to Laos; excludes satellite terminals and licensed broadcasting transmitters.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Laos regulatory requirements (DOSM IEC-based MS standards, MTPC radio type-approval, MEM smart-energy radio, EDL grid interface), covering radio type-approval, EMC, electrical safety, and cybersecurity status in Laos.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与老挝监管要求（DOSM基于IEC的MS标准、MTPC无线电型号核准、能源矿产部智能能源无线、EDL电网接口）的差距对照，涵盖无线电型号核准、电磁兼容、电气安全及老挝网络安全状况。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與寮國監管要求（DOSM基於IEC的MS標準、MTPC無線電型號核准、能源礦產部智慧能源無線、EDL電網接口）的差距對照，涵蓋無線電型號核准、電磁相容、電氣安全及寮國網路安全狀況。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, government assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Lao law, applicable DOSM/MTPC/MEM standards, and EDL grid requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. Laos regulatory information changes frequently and this page may not reflect the most recent requirements.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、政府评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行老挝法律、适用的DOSM/MTPC/MEM标准及EDL电网要求。老挝监管信息变化频繁，本页内容可能未反映最新要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、政府評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行寮國法律、適用的DOSM/MTPC/MEM標準及EDL電網要求。寮國監管資訊變化頻繁，本頁內容可能未反映最新要求。

answer_first.en: MTPC radio type-approval is the primary mandatory gate for wireless devices entering Laos; DOSM IEC-based MS standards govern electrical safety and EMC on a voluntary-to-mandatory spectrum; MEM and EDL apply additional requirements for smart-energy radio interfaces; Laos has no formal cybersecurity framework for wireless devices as of mid-2026; and Laos has no horizontal RoHS equivalent. China MIIT type-approval, SRRC, and CCC certifications provide a useful technical baseline but do not substitute for Lao approvals.
answer_first.zh: MTPC无线电型号核准是进入老挝的无线设备首要强制门槛；DOSM基于IEC的MS标准在自愿至强制的范围内规范电气安全和电磁兼容；能源矿产部和EDL对智能能源无线接口提出额外要求；截至2026年中，老挝尚无正式的无线设备网络安全框架；老挝亦无水平性RoHS等效规定。中国工业和信息化部型号核准、SRRC及CCC认证提供了有用的技术基础，但不能替代老挝审批。
answer_first.zht: MTPC無線電型號核准是進入寮國的無線設備首要強制門檻；DOSM基於IEC的MS標準在自願至強制的範圍內規範電氣安全和電磁相容；能源礦產部和EDL對智慧能源無線接口提出額外要求；截至2026年中，寮國尚無正式的無線設備網路安全框架；寮國亦無水平性RoHS等效規定。中國工業和信息化部型號核准、SRRC及CCC認證提供了有用的技術基礎，但不能替代寮國審批。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Lao DOSM/MTPC primary sources preferred; secondary trade-law sources acceptable where primary unavailable.
